item.nightsmediumcore.living_heart.toolt: Right-click to permanently gain a lifesteal heart. Drops on death if mediumcore is enabled.
item.nightsmediumcore.crystal_heart.tool: Right-click to restore one lost mediumcore heart. Has a cooldown and cannot be used in combat.
item.nightsmediumcore.supreme_crystal_he: Right-click to restore all lost mediumcore hearts. No cooldown.
item.nightsmediumcore.blood_relic.toolti: Upgraded Heart Relic. Gives bonus hearts, Regen 1, and a chance for mobs to drop Living Hearts.
item.nightsmediumcore.vampiric_scythe.to: Heals on hit and gives a chance for mobs to drop Living Hearts on kill.
